hero_subtitle: SFTY consolidates fragmented KYC provider data into a unified workflow that enables consistent routing, structured decision-making, and audit-ready evidence for digital asset compliance teams.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: KYC outputs remain disconnected across providers
problem_description: Compliance teams face slow and error-prone workflows when KYC data arrives in inconsistent formats from multiple vendors. This fragmentation complicates routing, decision-making and creates gaps in audit-ready evidence for onboarding and review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY standardizes and consolidates KYC data from multiple providers into one structured workflow, enabling consistent routing, decision tracking and audit-ready evidence for onboarding and compliance teams.
workflow_title: From KYC provider outputs to decisions
workflow_description: SFTY normalizes fragmented KYC provider data into structured reviews routed through cases, workflows, decisions and audit evidence for operational compliance control.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects and normalizes KYC provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases, and audit-ready evidence that streamline routing and regulatory review for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs by unifying fragmented KYC data into auditable workflows, preserving evidence for due diligence and enabling enterprise-grade governance and deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how KYC outputs are normalized for decisions
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYC provider data integrates into workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence is preserved from KYC outputs
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports routing across multiple KYC providers
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer that connects KYC outputs into structured workflows, cases and decisions for VASP compliance teams to improve onboarding, auditability and risk visibility.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY normalize KYC provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY standardizes diverse KYC provider data into a consistent format that supports risk-based routing, review workflows and internal compliance policies across multiple providers and jurisdictions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYC evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves KYC case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to support a clear, reviewable audit trail for onboarding and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule systems, integrating provider outputs while supporting role-based access and governance across your current compliance stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or onboarding providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or onboarding providers but connects their outputs into one structured compliance operating layer for decisions and reporting.
final_title: Normalize KYC outputs into controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects fragmented KYC data for routing, decision logging and audit-ready evidence in VASP compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
